_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of erythrocyte p55/MPP1 as a binding partner of NF2 tumor suppressor protein/Merlin.

_contextSnippet: is suitable for all immunocytochemistry applications tested so far...used 2G4 monoclonal antibody to detect native p55 in the human peripheral blood by immunofluorescence microscopy
details: Suitable for all immunocytochemistry applications tested, successfully used for Western blotting, immunofluorescence microscopy, and immunoprecipitation
